variants.title: WG765
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec WG765. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the WG765 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Special Filter, Media: Glass Fiber + Water Removal, Efficiency 1: 5µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 7µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 88.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 40.1 mm, Length: 411.0 mm, Bypass Pressure: 6.0 BAR bar, Δ Collapse Pressure: 30 bar, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 5µ @ β200, Media Type: Glass Fiber + Water Removal, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Bypass Pressure Bypass pressure relieve build-up of pressure within the system and allows medium to bypass the element when pressure increases and reaches a sufficient level.: 6.0 BAR, Collapse Pressure: 30 BAR, Seal: Nitrile

variants.title: WG765
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter HD 9014 x Hydraulics | Replaces the Filtrec WG765
variants.description: MANN-FILTER hydraulic filter elements for high-pressure filters offer maximum filtration performance and ensure trouble-free operation of the hydraulic system. Thanks to the filter medium, which is specially adapted to the intended use, the finest impurities are separated from the hydraulic fluid.
specifications: Style: Hydraulics, Dimension A: 88.0 mm, Dimension B: 40.0 mm, Dimension H: 410.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 5µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 7µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 88.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 40.1 mm, Length: 411.0 mm, Media Type: Glass Fiber + Water Removal, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Bypass Pressure Bypass pressure relieve build-up of pressure within the system and allows medium to bypass the element when pressure increases and reaches a sufficient level.: 6.0 BAR, Collapse Pressure: 30 BAR, Seal: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C

variants.title: WG765
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P550827 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge | Replaces the Filtrec WG765
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P550827 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge is designed to provide superior protection for your hydraulic system, effectively capturing contaminants to ensure clean fluid circulation. With high-quality filtration media, it extends equipment life, improves operational efficiency, and maintains fluid cleanliness even in the most demanding environments. Built for industrial, agricultural, and heavy-duty applications, this filter offers excellent dirt-holding capacity and flow efficiency. Its easy installation and maintenance help reduce downtime, making it a reliable choice for keeping hydraulic systems running smoothly.
